reason: Converted three redundant text buttons to icon-only to match the existing chat header pattern: SessionSidebar.tsx '+ New conversation' button (was text-only, no icon, no aria-label) and the KodyChat.tsx header 'New conversation' + 'Chats' buttons (had Plus/MessageSquare icons paired with hidden sm:inline text spans). All three now render a single lucide-react icon, keep aria-label + title tooltips, and align to the existing icon-only pattern (p-2 padding, w-4 h-4 icons). Click behavior unchanged. Heading 'Conversations' in the sidebar header is untouched per the issue.
